title: senecio lagascanus
intro: Senecio lagascanus, also known as Lagasce's groundsel, is a perennial plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Senecio lagascanus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations, among others. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves can also be used in infusions, salves, or creams to harness its medicinal properties.
